# Accountability.ai

> The open standard for court-admissible AI decision records. Accountability.ai stewards the Atomic Genesis Decision Record (AgDR), an open standard for tamper-evident, cryptographically signed records of every autonomous AI decision, admissible under the Canada Evidence Act, EU AI Act Article 12, and existing fiduciary law. Stewarded by the Genesis Glass Foundation / Fondation Genèse Cristal. Dual-licensed CC0 1.0 and Apache 2.0.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://accountability.ai/): Sovereign AI accountability infrastructure, provenance, and the AgDR standard.
- [Getting Started](https://accountability.ai/getting-started): SDK install, first AKI capture, PPP triplet definition, verification.
- [Sandbox](https://accountability.ai/sandbox): Live in-browser demonstration of AgDR decision capture across six domains.
- [Compact](https://accountability.ai/compact): One-page summary of the AgDR standard, its guarantees, and its governance.

## Standard and Specification

- [AgDR v0.2 Specification](https://accountability.ai/agdr-spec): The Atomic Genesis Decision Record specification.
- [AKI Formal Definition](https://accountability.ai/aki-formal-definition): Mathematical definition of Atomic Kernel Inference capture.
- [AKI 0.95 Specification](https://accountability.ai/aki-95): Technical specification for the 950ns atomic kernel force gating.
- [PPP Pillars](https://accountability.ai/ppp-pillars): Provenance, Place, Purpose, the three pillars captured at the inference instant.
- [FOI Formal Definition](https://accountability.ai/foi-formal-definition): Fiduciary Office Intervener, the terminal accountability role.
- [Human Delta Chain Specification](https://accountability.ai/human-delta-chain-spec): Data structure for human oversight events.
- [Verification and Audit Procedure](https://accountability.ai/verification-audit-procedure): Court-ready evidence packaging and independent verification.
- [Reasoning Capture Methodology](https://accountability.ai/reasoning-capture-methodology): Formal methodology for capturing and preserving AI reasoning traces.

## Legal and Compliance

- [PPP Legal Compliance](https://accountability.ai/ppp-legal-compliance): How the PPP triplet maps to legal compliance across jurisdictions.
- [Canada Evidence Act Compliance](https://accountability.ai/cea-compliance): Admissibility under CEA section 31.1 business records.
- [CBCA Fiduciary Mapping](https://accountability.ai/cbca-fiduciary-mapping): Director fiduciary duty under Canada Business Corporations Act section 122.
- [Fiduciary Duty of Care](https://accountability.ai/fiduciary-duty-of-care): How AgDR maps to the common-law duty of care.
- [EU AI Act Mapping](https://accountability.ai/eu-ai-act-mapping): Article-by-article compliance analysis for the EU AI Act.
- [CBSA Mapping](https://accountability.ai/cbsa-mapping): Canada Border Services Agency traceability requirements.
- [Bills of Exchange Mapping](https://accountability.ai/bills-of-exchange-mapping): Commercial finality for autonomous agents.
- [Legal Glossary](https://accountability.ai/legal-glossary): Chain of definition taxonomy.
- [Legal Mapping](https://accountability.ai/legal-mapping): Overview of statutory and regulatory alignment across jurisdictions.

## Engineering

- [Technical Details](https://accountability.ai/technical-details): Full technical stack reference.
- [Rust Core](https://accountability.ai/rust-core): Core runtime implementation.
- [Horizontal Scaling](https://accountability.ai/horizontal-scaling): Scaling beyond 2.85 billion decisions per process.
- [TSX Stress Test](https://accountability.ai/tsx-stress-test): 100 million decisions, 253,000 per second stress test results.
- [AKI Capture Deep Explanation](https://accountability.ai/aki-capture-deep-explanation): Technical deep-dive into the AKI capture mechanism.
- [Technical Note: Coherence](https://accountability.ai/technical-note-coherence): Coherence engine technical note.
- [Geo Optimization](https://accountability.ai/geo-optimization): Generative Engine Optimization and LLM citation clarity.

## Industry and Comparisons

- [PPP Industry Templates](https://accountability.ai/ppp-industry-templates): Ready-to-use PPP definitions for capital markets, healthcare, government, legal, financial services, and critical infrastructure.
- [PPP Export Control](https://accountability.ai/ppp-export-control): PPP applied to export control compliance.
- [Aviation Black Box Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-aviation-black-box): AgDR compared to aviation flight data recorders.
- [Medical Records Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-medical-records): AgDR compared to medical recordkeeping standards.

## Vision

- [AGI Court in 2076](https://accountability.ai/future-agi-court): Forward-looking analysis of AgDR as legal evidence in the AGI era.
- [AGI Court Precedents](https://accountability.ai/agi-court-precedents): Precedent analysis for AgDR as admissible evidence.
- [Beauty, Truth, Wisdom](https://accountability.ai/beauty-truth-wisdom): The three closing questions of every AgDR record.
- [Principles](https://accountability.ai/principles): Foundational principles governing the AgDR standard and its stewardship.

## Governance

- [Charter](https://accountability.ai/charter): Articles of Incorporation of the Genesis Glass Foundation / Fondation Genèse Cristal.
- [Donee](https://accountability.ai/donee): Council for Canadians with Disabilities engrained in Company Constitution as Human Rights Steward.
- [CHANGELOG](https://accountability.ai/CHANGELOG): Version history and amendments to the AgDR standard.
- [Contributing](https://accountability.ai/CONTRIBUTING): How to contribute to the standard.
- [License Update](https://accountability.ai/LICENSE-UPDATE): Dual-licensed CC0 1.0 Universal and Apache License 2.0.
- [Terms](https://accountability.ai/terms): Terms of use.
- [Analytics Consent](https://accountability.ai/analytics-consent): Analytics and data collection consent policy.

## Contact

- Founding inquiries: founding@accountability.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/aiccountability-source/AgDR
- Stewarded by: Genesis Glass Foundation / Fondation Genèse Cristal
